CASE FILE #05b

SARAH'S RISE

Date: 4/18/2017

"She studied human behavior to understand the incomprehensible—how someone she loved could simply vanish."

CLASSIFICATION: TOP SECRET
ACCESS LEVEL: SHADOW PROTOCOL PERSONNEL ONLY

Mission Summary

Dr. Kumar channels grief over Alpha's disappearance into professional excellence.

Advances through behavioral science field with focus on psychological profiling.

Develops expertise in tracking methodologies and target analysis.

Gains security clearances and international government assignments.
